text:
tota        2012-02-19 20:10:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    japanese             Makefile 
  Added files:
    japanese/rubygem-myrurema Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  - Add a new port: japanese/myrurema
  
    myrurema provides a command 'rurema', which helps searching/browsing/writing
    the Japanese Ruby documents.
    (a.k.a. Rurema http://bugs.ruby-lang.org/projects/rurema/wiki )
  
    Author: Yutaka HARA
    WWW: http://rubygems.org/gems/myrurema
  
  PR:             ports/164869 (based on)
  Submitted by:   Shin-ya Murakami <murashin_AT_gfd-dennou_DOT_org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.792     +1 -0      ports/japanese/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/japanese/rubygem-myrurema/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/japanese/rubygem-myrurema/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/japanese/rubygem-myrurema/pkg-descr (new)
